title: Spawn In Seperate Villages
description: Makes you spawn in seperate villages the first time you join. You cannot spawn in the same village.
body:
This datapack adds a feature where if you join the world for the first time, your spawn gets set to the nearest village, its similair to datapacks like https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/spawn-in-village-5269174/ except in this one you all spawn in seperate villages, you do not spawn together in 1. 

DO NOTE:

YOU DIE THE FIRST TIME YOU JOIN SO THAT YOU SPAWN IN THE VILLAGE.
